parties.name: CARPENTER, DEBRAY 1474 INNES AVE. SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124

calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Oct-31-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DeBray Carpenter, in Propria Persona. Talea Carpenter in Propria Persona.

The Court asked why there is no corroboration by the mother. Mr. Carpenter responded that they thought they would need identification and that she did not have it at the time the forms were filed. The Court asked Mr. Carpenter if there is any reason his name is not on the record of birth. Mr. Carpenter responded that he did not know and that he was present at the birth. The Court asked for clarification regarding Talea Carpenter and Talea Whitfield. Ms. Carpenter responded that her maiden name is Whitfield. The Court reviewed the identification of the parties and stated that it is in agreement that the parties present are the parents. The Court granted the petition to Establish Fact of Birth (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not Reported)

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Continued To Oct-30-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
